attributes.description:
Appends a chevron to the right side of a navigation item.
Only used if `horizontal` is false.
attributes.name: chevron

attributes.description:
Toggle to true to show a divider above the element.
Only available when horizontal is false.
attributes.name: divider

attributes.description:
The navigation item's href target.
If provided, the navigation item will use an anchor tag otherwise it will use a button tag.

If the 'children' slot is provided, the navigation item will ignore the 'href' and use
accordion behavior.
attributes.name: href

attributes.description:
Reflects HTML details element state and allows control from parent.
Only used if `horizontal` is false and `children` is defined.
attributes.name: open

attributes.description:
When using `href`, this attribute will map to the underlying link's `rel` attribute.
Unlike regular links, the default is `noreferrer noopener` to prevent security exploits.

However, if you're using `target` to point to a specific tab/window,
this will prevent that from working correctly.

You can remove or change the default value by setting the attribute
to an empty string or a value of your choice, respectively.
attributes.name: rel

attributes.description: Tells the browser where to open the link. Only used when `href` is present.
attributes.name: target

cssParts.description: The component's base wrapper including children.
cssParts.name: base

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the chevron.
cssParts.name: chevron

cssParts.description: The wrapper that holds the children
cssParts.name: children

cssParts.description: The indicator used when current is set to true
cssParts.name: current-indicator

cssParts.description: The details element rendered when there are children available
cssParts.name: details

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the prefix.
cssParts.name: prefix

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the suffix.
cssParts.name: suffix

events.description: Emitted when the button loses focus.
events.name: syn-blur

events.description: Emitted when the button gains focus.
events.name: syn-focus

events.description: Emitted when the navigation item: - has children, - and is clicked while HTML details are shown.
events.name: syn-hide

events.description: Emitted when the navigation item: - has children, - and is clicked while HTML details are hidden.
events.name: syn-show

methods.description: Simulates a click on the nav-items button, link or summary.
methods.name: click

properties.description:
Appends a chevron to the right side of a navigation item.
Only used if `horizontal` is false.
properties.name: chevron

properties.description:
Toggle to true to show a divider above the element.
Only available when horizontal is false.
properties.name: divider

properties.description:
The navigation item's href target.
If provided, the navigation item will use an anchor tag otherwise it will use a button tag.

If the 'children' slot is provided, the navigation item will ignore the 'href' and use
accordion behavior.
properties.name: href

properties.description:
Reflects HTML details element state and allows control from parent.
Only used if `horizontal` is false and `children` is defined.
properties.name: open

properties.description:
When using `href`, this attribute will map to the underlying link's `rel` attribute.
Unlike regular links, the default is `noreferrer noopener` to prevent security exploits.

However, if you're using `target` to point to a specific tab/window,

You can remove or change the default value by setting the attribute

properties.name: rel

properties.description: Tells the browser where to open the link. Only used when `href` is present.
properties.name: target

slots.description: A presentational prefix icon or similar element.
slots.name: prefix

slots.description: A presentational suffix icon or similar element.
slots.name: suffix

slots.description: Slot used to provide nested child navigation elements. If provided, details and summary elements will be used. A chevron will be shown on the right side regardless of the chevron property.
slots.name: children

summary: Flexible button / link component that can be used to quickly build navigations.
